headline: A Look At J.B. Hunt (JBHT) Valuation After Margin Gains And Share Repurchases
summary: J.B. Hunt Transport Services (JBHT) is back in focus after reporting an operating margin of 8.0% versus 6.6% a year earlier, 19% operating income growth, and sizeable 2025 share repurchases, alongside lingering Final Mile Services concerns. See our latest analysis for J.B. Hunt Transport Services. Despite the latest operating margin headlines, recent trading has been softer, with a 7 day share price return of 6.05% and a 30 day share price return of 10.88%, while the 1 year total shareholder...
